Fishy HTTP  
![][image1]  
At this challenge we get 2 files:

* smphost.exe    
* sustraffic.pcapng

First i open my wireshark and anlyze the traffic, i got weird things here ![][image2]  
In the ‘blue’ teks you will find there are so many random words and at the end of this text there are two ‘=’ which mean this text is base64. So i decided to get every first letter from each word, to do that i need to put this text into a .txt file so i use nano in linux and i copied the ‘blue’ text and pasted to the nano tools and make save the file as file.txt. To get the base64 actually you can do without any script but i did that with script because it was efficient ✌️. So,	this is the script:  
with open('file.txt', "r") as file:  
    isi \= file.read()

kata\_kata \= isi.split()  
huruf\_depan \= "".join(kata\[0\] for kata in kata\_kata)  
print(huruf\_depan)

And i got:    
Ok these words obviously base 64, then i decoded them![][image3]  
I got the last flag ‘h77P\_s73417hy\_revSHELL}’  
Then for the first flag i used binwalk to analyze the .exe file![][image4]  
There are so many files here and you just need to grep dll file i did   
dd if=smphost.exe of=file.dll bs=1 skip=9662464 count=1000000  
And i got file.dll so i used ILSPY to anlayze it [https://github.com/icsharpcode/ilspy/releases](https://github.com/icsharpcode/ilspy/releases) here is the link if you don’t have the tool  
So i found it in the tool ![][image5]  
This is a good clue to solve the first flag remember in http stream we found there are html texts and so many tags in there ![][image6]  
So, i just need to take every single first tag and change them into the symbol in the clue  
I got hexadecimal text 646972202626206364205c55736572735c70616b6379626572626f745c446f63756d656e74735c2026262074797065204854427b54683474735f6430376e33375f

So i just need to decode this thing ![][image7]  
And i got the first part of flag ‘HTB{Th4ts\_d07n37\_’  
Flag:  HTB{Th4ts\_d07n37\_h77P\_s73417hy\_revSHELL}

Reference : [https://medium.com/@susantoerviano/write-up-ctf-fishy-http-hackthebox-532be1f9349d](https://medium.com/@susantoerviano/write-up-ctf-fishy-http-hackthebox-532be1f9349d)
